title: 【转载】普里戈津炮轰俄国防部克扣弹药，绍伊古下令管控军备
meta_description: 【转载】普里戈津炮轰俄国防部克扣弹药，绍伊古下令管控军备 - 新闻来源俄罗斯反对派媒体meduza，下文为两篇新闻正文。  Wagner Group founder Evgeny Prigozhin said Friday that [b]his mercenaries will hand over their po...
meta_keywords: 转载,普里,戈津,炮轰,国防部,克扣,弹药,绍伊,下令,管控,军备
contents:
新闻来源俄罗斯反对派媒体meduza，下文为两篇新闻正文。

Wagner Group founder Evgeny Prigozhin said Friday that his mercenaries will hand over their positions in Bakhmut to units from the Russian Defense Ministry, and that the group’s remaining fighters will be sent to support bases in the rear.

“I’m withdrawing Wagner Group units from Bakhmut, because without ammunition, they’re doomed to die meaningless deaths,” Prigozhin said in a video statement addressed to Russia’s military command, Vladimir Putin, and the Russian people.

On Thursday night, Prigozhin released a video that showed him cursing at Russia’s military leadership and demanding ammunition supplies as he stood in front of rows of dead bodies.



According to the Russian military, Russia’s Defense Minister Sergey Shoigu ordered the supply of weapons for the “special military operation” to be kept “under special control.”

Shoigu gave this order while conducting an inspection in the Southern Military District. The ministry also released a video of Shoigu examining military equipment.

Earlier on May 5, Wagner Group head Evgeny Prigozhin directly addressed Defense Minister Sergey Shoigu and the country’s most senior general, Chief of the General Staff Valery Gerasimov, blaming them and Russia’s elites generally for setbacks in Bakhmut (where Wagner Group has been fighting at heavy costs for months).


在不明身份的无人机现身克宫的一天后，普京总统的亲密战友、御用大厨、瓦格纳创始人普里戈津同志再一次公开炮轰了国防部长绍伊古和总参谋长、特别军事行动总指挥格拉西莫夫上将，谴责他们对瓦格纳弹药的供应缺乏导致了瓦格纳人的重大损失。普里戈津同志还表示，由于弹药的缺乏，瓦格纳考虑将巴赫穆特的阵地移交给伟大的俄罗斯国防军。

作为回应，当天国防部长绍伊古下令对军备供应进行特别管控。有这样一位不卑不亢的国防部长，粉碎了瓦格纳集团的狼子野心，相信特别军事行动必将按计划进行，普里戈津的野心必将受到全体俄罗斯爱国者的唾弃。
